0: Create a 2/1 white Cat Warrior creature token. When you do, if you control a red permanent other than Ajani, he deals damage equal to the number of creatures you control to any target.

—Aarsil the Blessed

data.name: Guardian Lions
data.oracle_text: Vigilance (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.)
data.flavor_text: Approach in peace or not at all.

data.name: Guma
data.oracle_text: Protection from blue
data.flavor_text: When the giant returned for the night, he found a dead merfolk on his pillow. Although he praised the little guma, he inwardly wondered where she had hid the head.

data.name: Half-Kitten, Half-
data.oracle_text:
Whenever you're dealt damage,
Augment {2}{W} ({2}{W}, Reveal this card from your hand: Combine it with target host. Augment only as a sorcery.)

data.name: Healer of the Pride
data.oracle_text: Whenever another creature you control enters, you gain 2 life.
data.flavor_text: "No life is without meaning. No living thing is too small to be strong."

data.name: Helpful Hunter
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, draw a card.
data.flavor_text:
"Ah, the conquering hero returns! What trials did you face, little one?"
—Basri Ket

data.name: Herald of the Forgotten
data.oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, if you cast it, return any number of target permanent cards with cycling abilities from your graveyard to the battlefield.

data.name: Hero of the Pride
data.oracle_text: Whenever you cast a spell that targets this creature, creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: Leonin fight for neither god nor polis; their loyalty is to their pride.

data.name: Highcliff Felidar
data.oracle_text:
Vigilance
When this creature enters, for each opponent, choose a creature with the greatest power among creatures that player controls. Destroy those creatures.
data.flavor_text: Once the felidar has marked you as prey, there's no point in running.

card_faces.name: Honorbound Page
card_faces.oracle_text:
First strike
This creature enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)

card_faces.name: Forum's Favor
card_faces.oracle_text: Target creature gets +1/+0 and gains flying until end of turn.

data.name: Horned Cheetah
data.oracle_text: Whenever this creature deals damage, you gain that much life.
data.flavor_text: "I think she wants us to eat it," said Squee, staring at the oily carcass the cheetah had dragged to their fire.

data.name: Hungry Lynx
data.oracle_text:
Cats you control have protection from Rats. (They can't be blocked, targeted, or dealt damage by Rats.)
At the beginning of your end step, target opponent creates a 1/1 black Rat creature token with deathtouch.
Whenever a Rat dies, put a +1/+1 counter on each Cat you control.

data.name: Hunting Cheetah
data.oracle_text: Whenever this creature deals damage to an opponent, you may search your library for a Forest card, reveal that card, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

data.name: Huntmaster Liger
data.oracle_text:
Mutate {2}{W} (If you cast this spell for its mutate cost, put it over or under target non-Human creature you own. They mutate into the creature on top plus all abilities from under it.)
Whenever this creature mutates, other creatures you control get +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the number of times this creature has mutated.

data.name: Ice Cream Kitty
data.oracle_text:
{2}, Sacrifice another creature or token: Draw a card. Activate only as a sorcery.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: You gain 3 life.
data.flavor_text:
"That's not what they mean by 'pet food,' dude!"
—Michelangelo

data.name: Illusory Ambusher
data.oracle_text:
Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.)
Whenever this creature is dealt damage, draw that many cards.
data.flavor_text:
"Violence is the food it craves. Feed it if you dare."
—Doriel, mentor of Mistral Isle

card_faces.name: Infirmary Healer
card_faces.oracle_text: This creature enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)

data.name: Ingenious Leonin
data.oracle_text: {3}{W}: Put a +1/+1 counter on another target attacking creature you control. If that creature is a Cat, it gains first strike until end of turn. (It deals combat damage before creatures without first strike.)
data.flavor_text: Leonin claws were already deadly weapons of natural evolution before he improved upon them.

data.name: Initiate's Companion
data.oracle_text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, untap target creature or land.
data.flavor_text:
"I'd like to say that it's our pet, but the reverse may be closer to the truth."
—Ixor, initiate of Rhet crop

data.name: Inkling Mascot
data.oracle_text: Repartee — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell that targets a creature, this creature gains flying until end of turn. Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)
data.flavor_text: At the ready when words fail.

data.name: Iridescent Tiger
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, if you cast it, add {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}.
data.flavor_text: The power of the dragonstorms transformed not only the land but many of the creatures within it.

data.name: Ironpaw Aspirant
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.
data.flavor_text:
"Train your mind and your muscles with equal ferocity, cub. Without wisdom, even a mighty warrior is nothing but a bully."
—Sovereign Okinec Ahau

data.name: Jamuraan Lion
data.oracle_text: {W}, {T}: Target creature can't block this turn.
data.flavor_text:
The lion blinked
—Femeref expression meaning "situation avoided"

data.name: Jareth, Leonine Titan
data.oracle_text:
Whenever Jareth blocks, it gets +7/+7 until end of turn.
{W}: Jareth gains protection from the color of your choice until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: Light's champion in the stronghold of darkness.

data.name: Jazal Goldmane
data.oracle_text:
First strike (This creature deals combat damage before creatures without first strike.)
{3}{W}{W}: Attacking creatures you control get +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the number of attacking creatures.
data.flavor_text:
"As my kha, he is the source of my inspiration. As my brother, he is the embodiment of my aspirations."
—Ajani Goldmane

data.name: Jedit Ojanen
data.flavor_text: Mightiest of the cat warriors, Jedit Ojanen forsook the forests of his tribe and took service with the Robaran Mercenaries, rising through their ranks to lead them in the battle for Efrava.

data.name: Jedit Ojanen, Mercenary
data.oracle_text: Whenever Jedit Ojanen or another legendary creature you control enters, you may pay {G}. If you do, create a 2/2 green Cat Warrior creature token with forestwalk. (It can't be blocked as long as defending player controls a Forest.)

data.name: Jedit Ojanen of Efrava
data.oracle_text:
Forestwalk (This creature can't be blocked as long as defending player controls a Forest.)
Whenever Jedit Ojanen attacks or blocks, create a 2/2 green Cat Warrior creature token with forestwalk.
data.flavor_text: The cat warriors recognized this Jedit's face, but not his fierce loyalty to Efrava.

data.name: Jedit's Dragoons
data.oracle_text:
Vigilance
When this creature enters, you gain 4 life.
data.flavor_text: After Efrava was destroyed, the cat warriors scattered across Dominaria. Those who followed Jedit's example were strong enough to survive the ravages of apocalypse.

data.name: Jermane, Pride of the Circus
data.oracle_text:
{G}, {T}: Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature with four or more legs.
{1}{G}{G}, {T}: Until end of turn, all creatures able to block target creature with four or more legs do so.
data.flavor_text: "Don't worry about me, folks! This beauty was well-fed by my predecessor."

data.name: Jetmir, Nexus of Revels
data.oracle_text:
Creatures you control get +1/+0 and have vigilance as long as you control three or more creatures.
Creatures you control also get +1/+0 and have trample as long as you control six or more creatures.
Creatures you control also get +1/+0 and have double strike as long as you control nine or more creatures.

data.name: Jetmir's Fixer
data.oracle_text: {R}{G}: This creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. If mana from a Treasure was spent to activate this ability, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature instead.
data.flavor_text: When you lose Jetmir's trust, his family makes sure you lose everything else.

data.name: Jewel Thief
data.oracle_text:
Vigilance, trample
When this creature enters, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
data.flavor_text: "They can afford the loss. They build it into their prices."

data.name: Jhovall Queen
data.oracle_text: Vigilance
data.flavor_text: War-trained jhovalls eat twice their weight in war-trained soldiers daily.

data.name: Jungle Lion
data.oracle_text: This creature can't block.
data.flavor_text: The lion's only loyalty is to its hunger.

data.name: Kaheera, the Orphanguard
data.oracle_text:
Companion — Each creature card in your starting deck is a Cat, Elemental, Nightmare, Dinosaur, or Beast card. (If this card is your chosen companion, you may put it into your hand from outside the game for {3} as a sorcery.)
Vigilance
Each other creature you control that's a Cat, Elemental, Nightmare, Dinosaur, or Beast gets +1/+1 and has vigilance.

data.name: Keeper of Fables
data.oracle_text: Whenever one or more non-Human creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, draw a card.
data.flavor_text:
"Only the lion knows more stories than I do."
—Chulane, Teller of Tales

data.name: Kemba, Kha Enduring
data.oracle_text:
Whenever Kemba or another Cat you control enters, attach up to one target Equipment you control to that creature.
Equipped creatures you control get +1/+1.
{3}{W}{W}: Create a 2/2 white Cat creature token.

data.name: Kemba, Kha Regent
data.oracle_text: At the beginning of your upkeep, create a 2/2 white Cat creature token for each Equipment attached to Kemba.
data.flavor_text: "We must rebuild Taj-Nar. Not for Raksha, not for the Vanished Ones, but for those who still remain."

data.name: Kemba's Legion
data.oracle_text:
Vigilance
This creature can block an additional creature each combat for each Equipment attached to this creature.
data.flavor_text: The squabble over succession was quickly replaced by the struggle to survive.

data.name: Kemba's Outfitter
data.oracle_text:
When Kemba's Outfitter enters, choose one —
• Choose an Equipment card in your hand. It perpetually gains equip {1}.
• Target Equipment you control perpetually gains equip {1}.

data.name: Kemba's Skyguard
data.oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, you gain 2 life.
data.flavor_text:
"We're now to dispense aid to any Mirran we see battling anything . . . 'strange.' Regent's orders."
—Ranya, skyhunter captain

data.name: Kimahri, Valiant Guardian
data.oracle_text:
Vigilance
Ronso Rage — At the beginning of combat on your turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Kimahri and tap target creature an opponent controls. Then you may have Kimahri become a copy of that creature, except its name is Kimahri, Valiant Guardian and it has vigilance and this ability.

data.name: King Cheetah
data.oracle_text: Flash
data.flavor_text:
If you find yourself and a friend being chased by a king cheetah, you have but one chance: Trip your friend.
—Suq'Ata wisdom

data.name: King of the Pride
data.oracle_text: Other Cats you control get +2/+1.
data.flavor_text:
"Glorious, to walk again across the savannah with my beloved."
—"Love Song of Night and Day"

data.name: Kitt Kanto, Mayhem Diva
data.oracle_text:
When Kitt Kanto enters, create a 1/1 green and white Citizen creature token.
At the beginning of combat on each player's turn, you may tap two untapped creatures you control. When you do, target creature that player controls gets +2/+2 and gains trample until end of turn. Goad that creature.

data.name: Knight of Wundagore
data.oracle_text:
Trample
Whenever you put a +1/+1 counter on another creature, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. This ability triggers only once each turn.
data.flavor_text:
"Well struck, Lord Gator! Let our atomic steeds carry us to victory!"
—Lord Tyger

data.name: Kraven's Cats
data.oracle_text: {2}{G}: This creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Activate only once each turn.
data.flavor_text:
"This time the hunter shall get his prey—with the aid of my two little pets!"
—Kraven the Hunter

data.name: Krosan Vorine
data.oracle_text:
Provoke (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block it if able.)
This creature can't be blocked by more than one creature.

data.name: Kros, Defense Contractor
data.oracle_text:
At the beginning of your upkeep, put a shield counter on target creature an opponent controls.
Whenever you put one or more counters on a creature you don't control, tap that creature and goad it. It gains trample until your next turn. (Until your next turn, that creature attacks each combat if able and attacks a player other than you if able.)

data.name: Kutzil, Malamet Exemplar
data.oracle_text:
Your opponents can't cast spells during your turn.
Whenever one or more creatures you control each with power greater than its base power deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.
data.flavor_text: "Invaders in the West Chasm? Give me an hour and they'll be fungus food."

data.name: Kutzil's Flanker
data.oracle_text:
Flash
When this creature enters, choose one —
• Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature for each creature that left the battlefield under your control this turn.
• You gain 2 life and scry 2.
• Exile target player's graveyard.

data.name: Leonin Abunas
data.oracle_text: Artifacts you control have hexproof. (They can't be the targets of spells or abilities your opponents control.)
data.flavor_text: Only leonin clerics who can survive the Razor Fields for one turning of the suns can stand in the Cave of Light.

data.name: Leonin Arbiter
data.oracle_text: Players can't search libraries. Any player may pay {2} for that player to ignore this effect until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: "Our people are torn by infighting. Until the two sides reconcile, our laws can carry no meaning."

data.name: Leonin Armorguard
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: Well suited are the nacatl to a coat of steel and forge-tempered claws.

data.name: Leonin Battlemage
data.oracle_text:
{T}: Target creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
Whenever you cast a spell, you may untap this creature.
data.flavor_text: The strongest of the pride are measured not by the steel in their hands but by the steel in their souls.

data.name: Leonin Den-Guard
data.oracle_text: As long as this creature is equipped, it gets +1/+1 and has vigilance.
data.flavor_text: No one under the four suns can elude the watchful eye of the den-guard.

data.name: Leonin Elder
data.oracle_text: Whenever an artifact enters, you may gain 1 life.
data.flavor_text:
"The wisdom of the elders is just as much a weapon as a sword or spear. We must learn to wield it."
—Ushanti, leonin seer

data.name: Leonin Iconoclast
data.oracle_text: Heroic — Whenever you cast a spell that targets this creature, destroy target enchantment creature an opponent controls.
data.flavor_text: "The stars belong in the night sky. This is our world, and we are our own masters."

data.name: Leonin Lightbringer
data.oracle_text:
Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.)
As long as this creature is equipped, it gets +1/+1.
data.flavor_text: "It's hard to fight for the future if you can't see the way forward."

data.name: Leonin Lightscribe
data.oracle_text: Magecraft — Whenever you cast or copy an instant or sorcery spell, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: All who hear his inspiring words are filled with hope and pride.

data.name: Leonin of the Lost Pride
data.oracle_text: When this creature dies, exile target card from an opponent's graveyard.
data.flavor_text: Leonin band together in the Underworld, taking solace in their strength until, at last, both pride and self are forgotten.

data.name: Leonin Relic-Warder
data.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, you may exile target artifact or enchantment.
When this creature leaves the battlefield, return the exiled card to the battlefield under its owner's control.

data.name: Leonin Sanctifier
data.oracle_text:
Lifelink
When Leonin Sanctifier enters the battlefield, choose a creature card in your hand. It perpetually gains lifelink.

data.name: Leonin Shikari
data.oracle_text: You may activate equip abilities any time you could cast an instant.
data.flavor_text: Her instinct is as sharp as her blade.

data.name: Leonin Skyhunter
data.oracle_text: Flying
data.flavor_text: The skyhunters were born when the first leonin gazed at the heavens and wished to hunt the birds overhead.

data.name: Leonin Snarecaster
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, you may tap target creature.
data.flavor_text: Formerly oppressed by the polis of Meletis, leonin occasionally "mistake" their old enemies for game.

data.name: Leonin Squire
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, return target artifact card with mana value 1 or less from your graveyard to your hand.
data.flavor_text:
"I may be kha, but without my soldiers, my people, I am nothing."
—Raksha Golden Cub

data.name: Leonin Surveyor
data.oracle_text:
Start your engines! (If you have no speed, it starts at 1. It increases once on each of your turns when an opponent loses life. Max speed is 4.)
During your turn, this creature has first strike.
Max speed — {3}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Draw a card.

data.name: Leonin Vanguard
data.oracle_text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you control three or more creatures, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn and you gain 1 life.
data.flavor_text: The best fighters are skilled in both harming and healing.

data.name: Leonin Warleader
data.oracle_text: Whenever this creature attacks, create two 1/1 white Cat creature tokens with lifelink that are tapped and attacking.
data.flavor_text: When one leonin hunts, many more are surely nearby.

data.name: Leori, Sparktouched Hunter
data.oracle_text:
Flying, vigilance
Whenever Leori deals combat damage to a player, choose a planeswalker type. Until end of turn, whenever you activate an ability of a planeswalker of that type, copy that ability. You may choose new targets for the copies.

data.name: Liberated Livestock
data.oracle_text: When this creature dies, create a 1/1 white Cat creature token with lifelink, a 1/1 white Bird creature token with flying, and a 2/4 white Ox creature token. For each of those tokens, you may put an Aura card from your hand and/or graveyard onto the battlefield attached to it.

data.name: Lionheart Glimmer
data.oracle_text:
Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.)
Whenever you attack, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: The survivors would no longer be picked off one by one. It was their turn to hunt.

data.name: Lion Sash
data.oracle_text:
{W}: Exile target card from a graveyard. If it was a permanent card, put a +1/+1 counter on this permanent.
Equipped creature gets +1/+1 for each +1/+1 counter on this Equipment.
Reconfigure {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control; or unattach from a creature. Reconfigure only as a sorcery. While attached, this isn't a creature.)

data.name: Lion Vulture
data.oracle_text:
Flying (This creature can't be blocked except by creatures with flying or reach.)
At the beginning of your end step, if an opponent lost life this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and draw a card. (Damage causes loss of life.)
data.flavor_text: Fire Nation circuses captivate audiences with even more captive animals.

data.name: Loam Lion
data.oracle_text: This creature gets +1/+2 as long as you control a Forest.
data.set_name: Duel Decks: Ajani vs. Nicol Bolas
data.flavor_text: In Zendikar, today's grassland could be tomorrow's jungle, and hunting grounds change as quickly as the weather.
